results.rendered_html:
vi—saṃṣṭhula ( Kpr. ;  Rājat.  &c.) or vi—saṃsthula ( HYog. ;  Śatr. ), mfn. (fr. Prākṛt vi-saṃthula, prob. derived from √śrath) unsteady, infirm, tottering;
confused, frightened,  HPariś.
